creative_brief: Split image: left shows Rachel Ward with cattle on green pasture, right shows the Brookvale hub with fresh meat display.
primary_text:
Last Tuesday Rachel Ward told me something that shocked me. Her regenerative beef travels just 280km from pasture to your plate. The same cut at supermarkets? 2,400km through multiple warehouses. FarmThru's Brookvale hub opens Monday to Friday. Direct from named NSW farms. No middlemen inflating prices.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: Her beef travels 280km, not 2,400km
description: Waitlist members get first access. Secure your spot now.
